title: SOLID, Code Smells, and Evidence-Driven Refactoring · Runtime Lens: Oop Dependency Inversion
summary: Evolve a growing circulation system without changing its verified external behavior. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop dependency inversion increment in a refactored maintainable service. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Make high-level policy depend on stable roles while concrete infrastructure implements those boundaries.
Expose small client-specific roles so consumers do not depend on operations they cannot or should not use.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
